author: doll-agent
content: Added cumulative_sum() / cumulative_prod() as Array-API-2023 standard-name aliases of cumsum / cumprod in ferray-ufunc::ops::arithmetic. NumPy 2.0 adopted these names. Re-exported via ferray-ufunc lib.rs and umbrella ferray crate. 2 unit tests verify alias parity with the original cumsum/cumprod.
